description: Browse and play audiobooks from Audiobookshelf with bidirectional progress sync. Enriches locally-scanned Jellyfin audiobooks with metadata, cover images, and chapter markers from your ABS server.
name: Audiobookshelf
overview: Integrates Jellyfin with a self-hosted Audiobookshelf server. Provides metadata enrichment, cover images, chapter sync, and bidirectional listening progress sync for all mapped users.

versions.changelog: Remove MediaTypes filter to query all items, rely on TopParentIds for scope.
Add debug logging to trace library ID selection and query filtering.
Rebuild after checksum issues: verify clean build with correct assembly versions.

Add enhanced debugging to all tasks: Link Unmatched Items, Cleanup Invalid Links, Repair Broken Links, Refresh Metadata, Chapter Sync, Inbound Sync, and Outbound Sync now log selected libraries. Link Unmatched Items also logs search criteria for unmatched items.
Add enhanced debugging to Cleanup Invalid Links task: logs raw config IDs, parsed GUIDs, available libraries, and matching status to help diagnose why items are incorrectly cleaned up.
Add new scheduled task: Cleanup Invalid Links. Removes Audiobookshelf provider IDs from items that are not in selected libraries. Run manually when library selection changes.

Fix all scheduled tasks to respect selected Jellyfin libraries: Link Unmatched Items, Repair Broken Links, Refresh Metadata, Sync Chapters, Inbound Sync, and Outbound Sync now only process items from selected libraries.

Add JellyfinMetadataReader: reads metadata.json from audiobook folder for fallback metadata (ASIN, ISBN, Author); add path-based author extraction when metadata.json not available; enriched matching uses folder metadata when Jellyfin lacks provider IDs.

Fix library selection: show Jellyfin book/audio libraries instead of ABS libraries; fix config save error (libIds.split); show library selection on config page load; support both book and audio library types.

Add AssemblyVersion to fix Jellyfin showing incorrect plugin version; add scheduled task (Refresh Metadata) to periodically sync metadata from ABS; replace library ID text input with interactive library selection checkboxes that auto-load on connection test, defaulting to book-type libraries.
Fix Link Unmatched Items task: filter to Book library type only to avoid deserializing unknown item types; add error logging with exception details for better diagnostics.

Add scheduled task (Link Unmatched Items) that finds audiobooks without an Audiobookshelf provider ID and attempts to match them via ASIN, ISBN, or fuzzy title matching; add Audio type support alongside Book in AbsExternalId.

Recompile against Jellyfin 10.11.8 NuGet packages (was 10.11.3); update targetAbi to 10.11.8.0 to match runtime and eliminate interface ABI mismatch as the source of TypeLoadException on RegisterServices.

Fix TypeLoadException: rewrite LibraryEnrichmentService to resolve IProviderManager and IFileSystem lazily via IServiceProvider (method-body scope) instead of typed fields, keeping class-level type signature minimal for CLR assembly scan.

Fix TypeLoadException on plugin load: remove IMediaSegmentProvider implementation (MediaSegmentDto.Type transitively references Jellyfin.Database.Implementations.Enums unavailable in plugin load context); revert ProgressSyncService to UserDataSaved-only debounce (remove ISessionManager dependency).

Fix NotSupported on load: replace AddHostedService with plain singleton for LibraryEnrichmentService; remove explicit AbsLinkCleanupTask DI registration (auto-discovered); drop direct Jellyfin.Database.Implementations.Enums reference from AbsChapterSegmentProvider.
Fix TypeLoadException (NotSupported) on Jellyfin 10.11.8 servers: recompile against 10.11.8 API.

Add scheduled cleanup task (Repair Broken Links) that detects stale ABS provider IDs, re-matches against live ABS library, and writes a per-run report to the log directory; filter missing ABS items from all match candidates.

Auto-enrich new books on library scan (IHostedService + ItemAdded); expose ABS chapters as Jellyfin media segments (IMediaSegmentProvider); push progress to ABS immediately on playback stop or pause; fix AbsImageProvider order to prevent ffmpeg timeout on large MP3s; add ABS to Edit Metadata External IDs; fix 404 logged as warning for unplayed books.
